ogTitle: Upper Stone vs Upper Warrego: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Stone and Upper Warrego.
heading: Upper Stone vs Upper Warrego — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Stone, Queensland and Upper Warrego, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Stone has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Upper Warrego (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Stone or Upper Warrego safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Stone has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Upper Warrego scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Stone scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Warrego scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Stone or Upper Warrego?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Stone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
